title: AIO_OutW Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Function AIO_OutW (Channel As Integer) As Integer

Sub AIO_OutW (Channel As Integer, OutputData As Integer)
parameters:
Channel	Specify the channel number of the analog
		 I/O.

OutputData	Specify the output data (Integer expression
		 from 0 to 65535) in formula or value.
description: Reads or set analog value from the optional analog I/O output channel.
see_also:
AIO_In, AIO_InW, AIO_Out

AIO_OutW Example

VB
examples:
Dim val As Integer
val = m_spel.AIO_OutW(1)
